summary: All 10 Flowtym features tested and verified. PMS Bridge correctly loads 11 rooms from Supabase. Login, Flowboard KPIs, PMS Planning/Reservations/Check-in tabs, Housekeeping Stats/Rooms, and NotificationBell all working correctly.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Login Supabase (admin@flowtym.com / admin123) → Successful redirect to /flowboard
TEST 2: Flowboard KPIs display correctly - Occupation 27%, Arrivées 1, Départs 0, En séjour 4 clients, Chambres libres 8/11, Ménage fait 0/0
TEST 3: PMS Planning shows 11 rooms (Ch.101-Ch.304) loaded via Supabase Bridge
TEST 4: PMS Planning shows reservations - Sophie L. (102), Marc D. (201), Elena R. (202), Ahmed B. (303) visible on grid
TEST 5: PMS KPI cards display TO% 36%, ADR 120€, CH. LIBRES 7/11, ARRIVEES 1, DEPARTS 0
TEST 6: PMS Reservations tab shows 15 reservations (10 Confirmées, 3 En séjour, 1 Annulées)
TEST 7: PMS Check-in/out tab shows 3 clients en séjour (Sophie Dubois, Ali Larabi, Elena Rossi)
TEST 8: Housekeeping Stats KPIs correct - 11 Chambres, 0 Départs, 0 Recouches, 73% Propreté
TEST 9: Housekeeping displays 11 rooms (101-304) with correct statuses from Supabase
TEST 10: NotificationBell icon visible and panel opens on click
critical_code_review_comments: E-reputation scores remain MOCKED (hardcoded at 4.2/5) in Flowboard.jsx
Supabase Bridge successfully loads 11 rooms and 15 reservations using service_role key
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing Supabase data (11 rooms, 15 reservations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified working. Supabase Bridge in PMS iframe loads 11 rooms and 15 reservations. Console log confirms: '[Supabase Bridge] Loaded 11 rooms, 15 reservations, 15 clients'. Housekeeping uses V2 API with Supabase Realtime. NotificationBell component integrated in TopNavigation. E-reputation scores still mocked.

mocked_apis.E-reputation: global_score hardcoded at 4.2/5 with platforms Google: 4.3, Booking: 4.1, TripAdvisor: 4.2
